title: ClipForge cf-edit RFC 6902 JSON patch v1
description: Shape contract for the LLM-emitted JSON patch consumed by /clip-forge:edit --prompt. Three-layer validation: (1) this schema; (2) JSON Pointer whitelist enforced in bin/lib/edit-patch.mjs::applyPatch (the LLM may NOT edit /crop_path /audio_source /clip_id /source /output /version); (3) dry-run preview via AskUserQuestion. See PLAN-v0.4.0 §3.4 + §7 Q5.

patch.description: RFC 6902 patch ops. Empty array is valid (used by the LLM to signal 'ambiguous_prompt' or 'no change needed').

path.description: JSON Pointer per RFC 6901. Must start with '/'.

warning.description: Optional structured warning from the LLM when it could not safely interpret the prompt. Example codes: ambiguous_prompt, scope_exceeds_whitelist.
